message:
feat(vc_web): migrate shutdown signal from Tokio to Asupersync

Replace tokio::signal::ctrl_c() with asupersync::signal::ctrl_c() in the
graceful shutdown handler. The signal future is polled through the main
asupersync runtime chain, so it works correctly with the native driver.

tokio::net::TcpListener, tokio::time::interval, and tokio::select! are
intentionally kept: axum requires tokio's TcpListener, and the WebSocket
handler tasks are spawned on tokio's event loop where asupersync's timer
driver isn't active.

Axum runs inside the asupersync-tokio-compat bridge per the migration
strategy (asupersync::web is available but a full framework port is out
of scope for Phase 2c).

Part of bd-125: Phase 2c - Migrate vc_web to Asupersync HTTP stack

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
